running_headers_to_strip: ANOTHER WOMAN FOR THE HALL OF FAME
files.notes: The file contains two distinct pieces: a biographical article about Alice Freeman Palmer by Alice L. Reynolds, and a brief informational piece about mailing hints by Mrs. Jeanette A. Hyde. The second piece appears to be administrative content for the magazine rather than a full article.

files.notes: This file contains a single article about the Relief Society Nurse Aids' Course, followed by a short section titled 'QUALITY VS. QUANTITY LIVING' which appears to be part of the same article as it continues without a clear break and matches the content style. The article includes detailed requirements, instructions, and clothing lists for the nursing course.

files.notes: This file contains the complete Guide Lessons for March with 4 distinct lessons: Lesson I (Theology - Guardian Angels), Lesson II (Work and Business - appears to be just a header), Lesson III (Literature - Benjamin Franklin), and Lesson IV (Social Service - Courtship). The file also includes advertisements and other content at the end that should be included with the final lesson split.
